ifthen.title: Let good habits happen automatically 💫
ifthen.subtitle: No willpower needed — just automatic reactions
ifthen.noRulesHint:
Create "IF trigger → THEN action" rules
and turn good habits into automatic reflexes

profile.title: My space
profile.nicknameHint: After saving, mochi will greet you by your new nickname 🌱
profile.themeHint: Tap to switch instantly — the whole app will change ✨

gratitude.celebrate_msg: mochi thinks today is worth remembering too. May your heart feel light.

reflection.subtitle_today: Not about excuses — just 100% honest with yourself.
reflection.subtitle_yesterday: Some things didn't get done yesterday. It's not too late to reflect.
reflection.placeholder_today: Maybe you were tired, or something came up… just be honest, mochi won't judge you 🌿
reflection.placeholder_yesterday: What happened yesterday? Maybe tired, maybe interrupted… just be honest, mochi doesn't judge 🌿
reflection.pointsHint: Be honest with yourself. Completing a reflection earns +10 pt
reflection.celebrate_msg: Being 100% honest with yourself takes courage. mochi really admires that.

restDay.title: Rest day 🛁
restDay.subtitle: Intentionally giving yourself permission to rest is completely different from just forgetting.
restDay.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Not feeling well today, traveling, or just a recovery day for myself…
restDay.benefit1: ✓ Today's habits won't break your streak
restDay.benefit3: ✓ Logging a rest day earns +5 pt
restDay.celebrate_msg: Your rest day has been logged. Rest is part of taking care of yourself.

weeklyReview.title: Weekly review 🌸
weeklyReview.proudLabel: One thing I'm proud of this week 🎀
weeklyReview.proudPlaceholder: Doesn't have to be big — maybe you stuck with a habit, or said something kind to yourself…
weeklyReview.pointsHint: Complete the weekly review to earn +15 pt
weeklyReview.celebrate_msg: Seeing your own growth is a kind of strength. Keep going next week 🌱

reflectionList.title: My reflection journal
reflectionList.emptyHint: Complete today's reflection and it'll appear here
